aegidron.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take 60~80% less damage from explosive attacks, and are immune to Stun. (Does not stack)

amione.pe: While at a base, increases the Watering Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

anubis.pe: When activated, Anubis changes the player's attack type to Ground and increases Attack by 30~50%. Occasionally evades attacks with a flash sidestep during battle.

arsox.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, the player gains Cold Resistance +2. (Does not stack)

astegon.pe: Can be ridden as a flying mount. Increases the damage dealt to ores by 1100~3300%, and you can obtain 150~300% more Ore while mounted.

astralym.pe: This Pal's abilities are still being investigated. Contact us Privacy Policy Wuthering.gg PlaysSuikaGame.com Marvel Rivals Tracker Crimson Desert Database Subnautica 2 Interactive Map We are not assoc

azurmane.pe: Can be ridden. Grants Air Dash, to move at even higher speeds.

azurobe.pe: Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Water and increases Attack by 5~20%.

azurobe-cryst.pe: Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Ice and increases Attack by 5~20%.

bakemi.pe: While in party, attacking enemies afflicted with Poison reduces their Attack by 40~80%. (Does not stack)

bastigor.pe: Can be ridden. While mounted, delivers crushing blows with a hammer forged from Ice.

beakon.pe: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Electric and increases Attack by 5~20%. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by 5~25% for each other Electric Pal in

beakon-cryst.pe: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Ice and increases Attack by 5~20%. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by 5~25% for each other Ice Pal in your party

beegarde.pe: While in party, increases Elizabee's Attack. Sometimes drops Honey when assigned to Ranch.

bellanoir.pe: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Nightmare Ray. When this Pal uses Nightmare Ray, it has a x1.1~2.5 damage multiplier.

bellanoir-libero.pe: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Nightmare Bloom. When this Pal uses Nightmare Bloom, it has a x1.1~2.5 damage multiplier.

blazamut.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, increases the Attack and Defense of the Pal fighting alongside you by 5~10% whenever you defeat an enemy. This effect lasts 20 seconds and stacks up to five times.

blazamut-ryu.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, improves player's and Pals' Dragon damage to enemy weak points by 25~40%. (Does not stack)

blazehowl.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, Grass Pals drop 40~80% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

blazehowl-noct.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, Neutral Pals drop 40~80% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

blue-slime.pe: Can be ridden. Can jump high into the air while mounted.

braloha.pe: Can be ridden. While in your base, increases the egg production speed of Pals assigned to Breeding Farm by 20~50%. (Does not stack)

bristla.pe: While in party, increases Attack of Grass Pals by 15~30%. (Does not stack)

broncherry.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, Pal Eggs you pick up have a 35~45% chance of becoming an Alpha Pal Egg. (Does not stack)

broncherry-aqua.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, Pal Eggs you pick up have a 45~55% chance of becoming an Alpha Pal Egg. (Does not stack)

bulldosu.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, player and party Pals take 15~30% less Electric damage and are immune to Electrify. (Does not stack)

bushi.pe: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Iaigiri. When this Pal uses Iaigiri, it has a x1.1~2.5 damage multiplier.

bushi-noct.pe: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Iaigiri. When this Pal uses Iaigiri, it has a x1.1~2.5 damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's melee weapon damage by 30~65% but only when

caprity.pe: Sometimes drops Red Berries from its back when assigned to Ranch. While in party, restores 100~200 Pal’s Hunger to the Pal with the lowest Hunger every 5 minutes. (Does not stack)

caprity-noct.pe: Sometimes drops Venom Gland from its back when assigned to Ranch. While in party, restores 100~200 Pal’s Hunger to the Pal with the lowest Hunger every 5 minutes. (Does not stack)

carnibora.pe: While in party, when the player performs a dodge roll or dodge step, Carnibora creates a whirlwind that deals damage to enemies it touches ( Grass / Power: 40~80). (Does not stack)

cattiva.pe: While in party, Cattiva helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity by 100~200. (Does not stack)

cave-bat.pe: While in party, appears near the player. Automatically picks up nearby items.

cawgnito.pe: When activated, grants Night Vision to see in dark places. Activate again to turn off. Sometimes digs up Bone when assigned to Ranch.

celaray.pe: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Prevents fall damage and extends the duration of high-speed gliding.

celaray-lux.pe: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Prevents fall damage and extends the duration of high-speed gliding.

celesdir.pe: Can be ridden. This Pal's Attack and Movement Speed increases by 2~6% for each other Neutral Pal in your party. When in party, recovers Health of the player and Party Pals by 0.15~0.75% per second. (D

celesdir-noct.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, the Pal fighting alongside you gradually loses Health in exchange for 40~80% Attack increase. (Does not stack)

chikipi.pe: Sometimes lays an Egg when assigned to Ranch.

chillet.pe: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Dragon and increases Attack by 5~20%.

chillet-ignis.pe: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Fire and increases Attack by 5~20%.

cinnamoth.pe: When activated, attacks the targeted enemy with Poison Fog. While at a base, increases the Farming Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

clovee.pe: While at a base, increases the Gathering Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

cremis.pe: While in party, increases Attack of Neutral Pals by 15~30%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

croajiro.pe: When activated, Croajiro Noct channels its loyalty and puffs up its abdomen to store energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While airborne before landing, the player's Attac

croajiro-noct.pe: When activated, Croajiro Noct channels its loyalty and puffs up its abdomen to store energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While in party, improves player's and Pals' Dark

cryolinx.pe: While in party, Dragon Pals drop 40~80% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

cryolinx-terra.pe: While in party, when attacking enemy weak point, increases the power of the next weak point attack by 30~60%. (Does not stack)

daedream.pe: While in party, appears near the player. Attacks hostile enemies with Dark magic bullets. These bullets will not reduce the target's Health below 1.

dandilord.pe: When activated, the player's attacks inflict Poison 2~6. While in party, grants the player and party Pals immunity to Poison, and nullifies the effects of toxic gas in the World Tree area. (Does not s

dazemu.pe: Can be ridden. Movement Speed is increased by 50~100% while mounted on sand.

dazzi.pe: While in party, appears near the player. Attacks hostile enemies with Electric bolts. These bolts will not reduce the target's Health below 1.

dazzi-noct.pe: While in party, appears near the player. Attacks hostile enemies with Dark bolts. These bolts will not reduce the target's Health below 1.

demon-eye.pe: While in party, increases Attack of Dark Pals by 15~30%. (Does not stack)

depresso.pe: When activated, Depresso chugs an entire energy drink, increasing its Movement Speed and Work Speed by 100~900%. Sometimes drops Venom Gland when assigned to Ranch.

digtoise.pe: When activated, enters the Shell Spin state. Follows the player while spinning, increasing ore mining efficiency by 800~2000%.

dinossom.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, increase Defense of Dragon Pals by 15~30%. (Does not stack)

dinossom-lux.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, increases Defense of Electric Pals by 15~30%. (Does not stack)

direhowl.pe: Can be ridden. Moves slightly faster than most mounts.

dogen.pe: When activated, teleports to the nearest base. Cannot be used inside dungeons or similar areas.

dualith.pe: Can be ridden. When activated, Dualith fires a powerful Grass laser from its right hand.

dualith-noct.pe: Can be ridden. When activated, Dualith Noct fires a powerful Dark laser from its right hand.

dumud.pe: While in party, increases Attack of Ground Pals by 15~30%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops High Quality Pal Oil when assigned to Ranch.

dumud-gild.pe: While in party, increases amount of Gold Coin dropped by enemies by +100~200%. Sometimes drops High Quality Pal Oil when assigned to Ranch, with a small chance to drop Gold Coin. (Does not stack)

dupin.pe: While in party, when the player's Health falls below 50%, Dupin generates an explosion around the player ( Fire / Power: 100~200 / Burn buildup: 777). Additionally, while the player's Health is below

dynamoff.pe: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While at a base, shortens the time it takes to incubate eggs by 20~40%. (Does not stack)

eidrolon.pe: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal's Attack and Movement Speed increase by 2~6% for each other Dragonor Dark Pal in your party.

eidrolon-ignis.pe: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal's Attack and Movement Speed increase by 2~6% or each other Dragon or Fire Pal in your party. (Excluding Eidrolon Ignis)

eikthyrdeer.pe: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted and increases lumbering efficiency by 220~500%.

eikthyrdeer-terra.pe: Can be ridden. Can perform a double jump while mounted. While at a base, increases the Lumbering Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1 (Does not stack)

elgrove.pe: When activated, Elgrove changes the player's attack type to Grass and increases Attack by 30~50%.

elgrove-cryst.pe: While in party, grants the player the ability to Freeze enemies afflicted with Soak in one strike.

elizabee.pe: This Pal's Attack increases by 12~24% for each Beegarde in party.

elphidran.pe: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, Movement Speed is increased. While in party, Dark Pals drop 40~80% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

elphidran-aqua.pe: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While flying, Movement Speed is increased. While in party, player and party Pals take 15~30% less Fire damage and are immune to Burn. (Does not stack)

enchanted-sword.pe: While in party, Dark Pals drop 40~80% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

eye-of-cthulhu.pe: When activated, Eye of Cthulhu charges and attacks targeted enemy.

faleris.pe: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, Ice Pals drop 40~80% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

faleris-aqua.pe: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, Fire Pals drop 40~80% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

felbat.pe: While fighting together, grants the player and Felbat a life steal effect that restores 5~9% of damage dealt as Health.

fenglope.pe: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted.

fenglope-lux.pe: Can be ridden. Can double jump while mounted. While in party, Water Pals drop 40~80% more items when defeated. (Does not stack)

finsider.pe: When activated, Finsider changes the player's attack type to Water and increases Attack by 30~50%.

finsider-ignis.pe: While in party, Finsider Ignis helps carry supplies, reducing the weight of weapons in your inventory by 60~100%. Also improves player's and Pals' Fire damage to enemy weak points by 25~40%. (Does not

flambelle.pe: While in party, recovers Health of the player and Party Pals by 0.1~0.5% per second outside of combat. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.

flaracle.pe: While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with Burn, the enemy explodes, dealing damage equal to 40~60% of the player's attack damage to nearby enemies. (Does not stack.)

flopie.pe: While in party, appears near the player. Automatically picks up nearby items.

foxcicle.pe: While in party, increases Attack of Ice Pals by 15~30%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Ice Organ when assigned to Ranch.

foxparks.pe: When activated, equips to the player and transforms into a flamethrower.

foxparks-cryst.pe: When activated, equips to the player and attacks using frigid air.

frostallion.pe: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Ice, inflict Freeze 2~6, increases Attack by 10~40%.

frostallion-noct.pe: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Dark, inflict Blind 2~6, increases Attack by 10~40%.

frostplume.pe: While in party, Frostplume's icy aura sharpens focus, increasing the player's reload speeds by 20~50%. (Does not stack)

fuack.pe: When activated, Fuack body surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.

fuack-ignis.pe: When activated, Fuack Ignis fire surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.

fuddler.pe: While in party, improves player mining efficiency by 30~60% and reduces Stone weight by 80~100%. (Does not stack)

galeclaw.pe: While in party, modifies the performance of the equipped glider. Enables high-speed gliding and allows shooting with the right hand.

ghangler.pe: Can be ridden to travel on water. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by 5~25% for each other Dark or Water Pal in your party. (Excluding Ghangler)

ghangler-ignis.pe: Can be ridden to travel on water. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by 5~25% for each other Fire or Water Pal in your party. (Excluding Ghangler Ignis)

gildane.pe: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Ground and increases Attack by 5~20%.

gildra.pe: While fighting together, when Gildra is incapacitated, it revives with its Hunger reduced to 0.

gloopie.pe: While in party, the capture gauge decreases 12~35% more slowly while the bars are not overlapping during the fishing minigame. (Does not stack)

gloopie-primo.pe: While in party, increases Defense of Water Pals by 15~30%. (Does not stack)

gobfin.pe: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Aqua Gun. When this Pal uses Aqua Gun, it has a x1.1~2.5 damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's Attack by 10~20%.

gobfin-ignis.pe: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with Spirit Fire. When this Pal uses Spirit Fire, it has a x1.1~2.5 damage multiplier. While in party, increases the player's Attack by 10~20%.

gorirat.pe: When activated, unleashes a primal fury that increases Gorirat's Attack by 75~300% for a limited time.

gorirat-terra.pe: While in party, increases the player's climbing speed by 50~100%. (Does not stack)

green-slime.pe: Can be ridden. Can jump high into the air while mounted.

grintale.pe: Can be ridden. While in party, picking up a Pal Egg has a 50~75% chance of receiving one extra. (Does not stack)

grizzbolt.pe: Can be ridden. Can rapidly fire a minigun while mounted.
